revision.comment: new template
+ fr
+ko, +zh, <onlyinclude>
plainlinks
style->class
Add category
iw +ca
[[wuu:Template:Noredirect]]
keep red if there is no page
revision.text: {{#ifexist:{{{1|}}} | [{{fullurl:{{{1}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2|{{{1}}}}}}] | [[{{{1}}}|{{{2|{{{1}}}}}}]] }} [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[ca:Plantilla:Noredirect]] [[fr:Modèle:Noredirect]] [[ko:틀:안넘겨주기]] [[zh:Template:Noredirect]] [[wuu:Template:Noredirect]]

{{#ifexist:{{{1}}} | [{{fullurl:{{{1}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2|{{{1}}}}}}] | [[{{{1}}}|{{{2|{{{1}}}}}}]] }} [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[ca:Plantilla:Noredirect]] [[fr:Modèle:Noredirect]] [[ko:틀:안넘겨주기]] [[zh:Template:Noredirect]] [[wuu:Template:Noredirect]]

{{#ifexist:{{{1|Example}}} | [{{fullurl:{{{1|Example}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2|{{{1|Example}}}}}}] | [[{{{1|Example}}}|{{{2|{{{1|Example}}}}}}]] }} [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[ca:Plantilla:Noredirect]] [[fr:Modèle:Noredirect]] [[ko:틀:안넘겨주기]] [[zh:Template:Noredirect]] [[wuu:Template:Noredirect]]

revision.comment: not likely but it might be img or category
revision.text: {{#ifexist:{{{1|Example}}} | [{{fullurl:{{{1|Example}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2|{{{1|Example}}}}}}] | [[:{{{1|Example}}}|{{{2|{{{1|Example}}}}}}]] }} [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[ca:Plantilla:Noredirect]] [[fr:Modèle:Noredirect]] [[ko:틀:안넘겨주기]] [[zh:Template:Noredirect]] [[wuu:Template:Noredirect]]

revision.comment: update syntax
moved [[Template:Noredirect]] to [[Template:No redirect]]
noinclude example
or just take out
and others
one more
simplify output if 2nd parameter not used

Protected Template:No redirect: [[WP:HRT|high risk template]] transcluded on over 2,000 pages. Batch protection; requests for review can be brought to [[WP:RFUP]]. using [[WP:TW|TW]] ([edit=sysop] (indefinite) [move=sysop] (indefinite))

Unprotected Template:No redirect: Consensus at [[WP:ANI]] was to unprotect; emerging consensus at [[WT:HRT]] may yet be to re-protect some/many/all - I won't consider it wheel-warring if another admin reprotects. using [[WP:TW|TW]]
see if this style works
[[Help:Reverting|Reverted]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/Train2104|Train2104]] ([[User talk:Train2104|talk]]) to last version by TFOWR
#REDIRECT [[Template:非転送]]
Protected Template:No redirect: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([edit=autoconfirmed] (indefinite) [move=sysop] (indefinite))
Adding {{pp-template}} ([[WP:TW|TW]])

Changed protection level of Template:No redirect: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Block all non-admin users] (indefinite))
remove {{pp-template}} - this is already added by {{documentation}}
Made elegantly substable with {{{|safesubst:}}}
Adding TFM tag
revision.text: {{Tfm/dated|page=No redirect|otherpage=No redirect conditional|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2016 June 22#Template:No redirect conditional|type=tiny|help=off}}{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifexist:{{{1}}} |[{{{{{|safesubst:}}}fullurl:{{{1}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2|{{{1}}}}}}] |{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{2|}}} |[[:{{{1}}}|{{{2}}}]] |[[:{{{1}}}]] }} }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: tfm relisted
revision.text: {{Tfm/dated|page=No redirect|otherpage=No redirect conditional|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2016 July 1#Template:No redirect conditional|type=tiny|help=off}}{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#ifexist:{{{1}}} |[{{{{{|safesubst:}}}fullurl:{{{1}}}|redirect=no}} {{{2|{{{1}}}}}}] |{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{2|}}} |[[:{{{1}}}|{{{2}}}]] |[[:{{{1}}}]] }} }} {{documentation}}

fix "|=foo" bug

revision.comment: Merge with [[Template:No redirect conditional]] per [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2016 July 1|TFD]]
fix double-colon errors
fix "|=foo" bug
28 revisions imported
1 revision imported: importing these templates
Back a couple versions per the talk page
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:No_redirect]]
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Used FULLPAGENAME again to fix the "Multi colon escape" lint error.
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: overwriting
Used FULLPAGENAME again to fix the "Multi colon escape" lint error.

1 revision imported: importing [[Template:Commons category]] from English wikipedia with removed timestamps to overwrite existing code, attempting to fix an error that makes the link not properly appear.
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Used FULLPAGENAME again to fix the "Multi colon escape" lint error.
1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors
Used FULLPAGENAME again to fix the "Multi colon escape" lint error.

1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on
Used FULLPAGENAME again to fix the "Multi colon escape" lint error.
